payload.primary_message: Deel offers transparent, flexible, scalable pricing for global hiring across contractors, full-time employees, and payroll with no hidden fees.
Automate repetitive HR processes like onboarding and offboarding without coding, saving time and reducing manual work.
Replace manual compensation spreadsheets with a unified platform to run faster, fairer, and compliant compensation reviews across global teams.
Deel enables global hiring and payroll management that scales without proportionally increasing costs.
Deel provides superior global employment infrastructure with in-house capabilities, broader integrations, and more payment options than Oyster, supported by best-in-class 24/7 customer support.
Deel provides a single integrated platform for startups to hire, manage, and pay employees globally across 150+ countries with built-in compliance and support.

payload.primary_message: Deel is an all-in-one global people platform that consolidates payroll, HR, compliance, and worker management across 150 countries into a single system.

Deel is an all-in-one Global People Platform that consolidates payroll, HR, compliance, and workforce management for companies expanding globally across 150 countries.
Deel is an all-in-one Global People Platform that enables companies to manage payroll, HR, and compliance for global teams in 150 countries from a single system.
Deel is an all-in-one Global People Platform that enables companies to expand globally with speed, compliance, and simplified payroll and HR management across 150 countries.

Deel provides a single unified platform for global payroll, HR, and compliance across 150+ countries and currencies, enabling companies to hire, manage, and pay workers anywhere with speed and reliability.

payload.primary_message: Deel offers transparent, scalable pricing that consolidates global hiring, contractor management, payroll, and compliance into a single platform with no hidden costs.
Deel provides an integrated platform spanning payroll, HR, IT, hiring, benefits, and mobility to simplify global workforce management in one system.
Deel maintains enterprise-grade security through strict global standards, advanced infrastructure, and comprehensive compliance certifications.
Deel enables companies to hire, manage, pay, and support a global workforce across 150+ countries from a single integrated platform.
Deel provides a single unified platform for running compliant payroll across 130+ countries with self-serve or managed options, automatic compliance, and global payment capabilities.
Deel IT consolidates fragmented IT operations (device management, access control, security, and support) into a single global platform that automates IT workflows triggered by HR events.
Deel enables companies to build and manage global remote and international teams efficiently without operational complexity.

Deel serves as a specialized global execution layer that consolidates fragmented country vendors into one unified platform, removing vendor sprawl and providing complete visibility and control over global workforce costs.
Build custom HR and payroll solutions by automating global workforce operations through a unified API.
Deel is a unified payroll, HR, and compliance platform that enables startups to hire, manage, and pay employees globally in minutes with one system.
Automatically provision, update, and remove access when people join, change roles, or leave, with permissions staying accurate across tools.
Deel automates compliance by embedding regulatory rules directly into payroll, hiring, and workforce workflows so rules apply automatically and risks are flagged early.

payload.primary_message: Deel has launched a native ATS that integrates recruiting, payroll, and onboarding into a single platform, eliminating gaps that previously cost weeks.
Deel has launched a rebuilt, AI-forward careers page with advanced candidate tools and natively integrated ATS to improve its hiring process and candidate experience.
Deel has launched a rebuilt careers page and proprietary ATS (DeelATS) to modernize hiring and demonstrate confidence in its integrated people platform.
Deel now allows global companies to pay employees in their preferred currency or stablecoin format within the same compliant payroll system without additional workarounds.
Deel's native ATS integrates recruiting, hiring, and onboarding in a single platform, eliminating the need for separate tools and manual data transfers.
Deel AI Analytics enables instant workforce insights through natural language queries on unified workforce data.

Deel has launched Akai, an agentic workflow platform that automates repetitive manual operations work at scale without requiring developers or IT support, with proven metrics of 91,000+ hours saved monthly and 20+ day processes reduced to minutes.
The Deel app has been rebuilt from the ground up to reduce the time workers spend on the platform by focusing on mobile-specific user needs rather than feature parity with the web product.
Deel has launched a native AI-powered ATS that integrates recruiting, headcount planning, and onboarding into one automated workflow to eliminate manual work and save time.
Deel's AI agent (Akai) integrated into DeelATS eliminates repetitive hiring tasks to create a more seamless hiring flow and improve experience for both teams and candidates.
Join Deel as a Staff Product Designer to shape design systems and the experience of 1.5 million workers globally while working with world-class design leadership and engineers.
Deel's compliance and employment data platform is now accessible within ChatGPT, enabling accurate global hiring information without leaving the chat interface.
Deel has launched Akai, an AI infrastructure platform that automates hiring, payroll error detection, and compliance management.
Deel AI Workforce launches seven assignable AI agents that handle high-volume administrative tasks in HR, payroll, and operations, freeing human teams to focus on strategic work.
Deel's stablecoin wallet eliminates conversion fees and FX loss in global payouts by allowing workers to hold, earn, and spend earnings directly without losing money to bank fees.

payload.statement: Deel offers a no-code Workflows automation product with a visual builder (triggers, actions, filters, rules) and a simulation/testing tool, letting customers build and customize HR process automations
Deel advertises flexible, usage-based, and transparent pricing with no long-term commitment and cancel-anytime terms.
Deel publicly reports scale metrics including 150+ countries of operation, 40,000+ customers, $20B+ in processed global payroll, and 90+ NPS among enterprise customers.
Deel offers a suite of hiring products covering talent sourcing, contractor engagement, and full-time employment (via EOR/PEO) globally.
Deel structures its pricing/offerings into tiers targeting different customer segments: first-time international hiring, compliance-focused scaling, and enterprise-level programs.
Deel promotes international payment capabilities including competitive exchange rates and multiple payment methods, alongside free demo access to explore the platform.
Deel's EOR service is marketed to include onboarding, compliance, payroll processing, tax filing, benefits administration, and HR/legal support as part of its fee.
